message:
Command `# The ODB (database) at step 24 still has the old port from before our netlist patch.
# We need to patch the ODB at step 24-odb-applydeftemplate too.
# OR we resume from an earlier step that reads the netlist - step 7 (OpenROAD.CheckSDCFiles)
# which would re-read the patched netlist.
# Let's check what step first reads the synthesis netlist into ODB
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/ | sort -V | head -20` executed with exit code 0.

ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/ | sort -V | head -20"}

extras.command:
# The ODB (database) at step 24 still has the old port from before our netlist patch.
# We need to patch the ODB at step 24-odb-applydeftemplate too.
# OR we resume from an earlier step that reads the netlist - step 7 (OpenROAD.CheckSDCFiles)
# which would re-read the patched netlist.
# Let's check what step first reads the synthesis netlist into ODB
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/ | sort -V | head -20
